Name: Mercedes-Benz
1Q: In which German city are headquarters of Mercedes-Benz?
tip1: Mercedes-Benz traces its origins to Karl Benz's creation of the first petrol-powered car.
2Q: What is the nickname for Mercedes racing cars since the 1930s?
tip2: The first Silver Arrow is considered to be the Grand Prix racing car Mercedes-Benz W25.
3Q: Which Mercedes-Benz model is known for the Gullwing doors?
tip3: When model 300SL was built, it was the fastest car in the world.
4Q: What is the name of the Mercedes-Benz official tuner?
tip4: The most extreme versions of AMG street legal race cars have the Black Series badge.
5Q: Which class is named the most luxurious Mercedes-Benz sedan?
tip5: The S Class has an armored version named S Guard, used for transport of world leaders and dignitaries.
6Q: Which Mercedes-Benz entered the Guinness Book of Records as the most expensive production car of its time?
tip6: CLK GTR was designed primarily as a race car, with the road cars necessary to meet homologation standards.
7Q: Which engine configuration was never used in the G Class SUV?
tip7: G-Wagen is manufactured only by Magna Steyr factory in Graz, Austria.
8Q: Which Mercedes-Benz model revolutionized the design in 2004, accepted as the first four-door coupe?
tip8: CLS estates have a lowered roofline, and they are known as Shooting Brake vehicles.
9Q: What is the name of the Mercedes-Benz brand for electric vehicles?
tip9: The first model was previewed at the Paris Motor Show in 2016 with the Generation EQ concept vehicle.
10Q: What engine volume does have the AMG Project ONE hybrid car?
tip10: The powertrain of the Mercedes-AMG ONE is a hybrid drivetrain that shares many features with modern Formula One cars.
